meta.title: Projects
meta.description: Discover projects using Nostr Web of Trust. Mapping Bitcoin and Obelisk integrate WoT for trust-based filtering and spam-free social experiences.

hero.title: Built with Nostr WoT
hero.subtitle: Projects integrating Web of Trust for decentralized trust, reputation, and spam filtering.

mappingBitcoin.name: Mapping Bitcoin
mappingBitcoin.description: Bitcoin merchant directory with 24,000+ venues worldwide. Uses Web of Trust to power trust-based reviews and ratings, ensuring authentic feedback from real users connected through the Nostr social graph.

obelisk.name: Obelisk
obelisk.description: Nostr client built for communities. Integrates Web of Trust to filter content by social distance, surface trusted interactions, and provide a spam-free experience across groups and feeds.

cta.title: Building with Nostr WoT?
cta.subtitle: If your project uses Web of Trust, let us know and we'll add it here.
